title: VATIN 10mm Double Faced Light Pink/Baby Pink Polyester Satin Ribbon - 45 Metre for Gift Wrapping Ornaments Party Favor Braids Baby Shower Decoration Floral Arrangement Craft Supplies
features: Size: 10 mm in width with continuous 45 metre per spool; ample length for various crafting projects
Quality Material: Crafted from 100% polyester; double-faced satin ribbon features stitched edges to prevent fraying; smooth and glossy on both sides, with a wrinkle-free surface
Durability: Made with robust polyester; thick and well-stitched edges ensure longevity; machine-washable without fading; suitable for outdoor use

Versatile Uses: Ideal for diverse applications including crafting exquisite Christmas ornaments, gift wrapping, wedding invitations, headbands, bridal bouquet, sewing, corset lacing, gift wrapping, hair bows, home decoration, handmade craft project; available in a wide range of classic colors
User Friendly: Features a smooth, wrinkle-free surface that requires no ironing; comes on a plastic roll spool with protective outer tape to keep the ribbon clean and easy to store
description: Product Description 10MM/3/8" Wide Double Faced Polyester Satin Ribbon WELL MADE VATIN Ribbon are sophisticated ribbon with perfect combination of softness and shine.These ribbons comes Simple, Stylish, Soft, Strong Toughness. Double face is polished shiny on both side. HIGH-PERFORMENCE Flexible and Versatile, Perfect for Crafts, Wrapping, Wedding, Party, Card Invitation, Sewing, Scrapbook, Hair Bow, Floral Projects, Packaging Design, Home and Holiday Decoration. MULTIPLE COLORS The beautiful colors add lively style and look nice with a range of color palettes. Details Elegant feel Shiny finish Create a high end look Flowers Ribbon has a lovely soft hand, very supple and a pleasure to work with. Ties and drapes beautifully. Events & Table decoration This beautiful and silky ribbon is ideal for adding the finishing touches to your anniversary gifts, wedding stationery, favors, decorations and much more! Perfect ribbon bow Will add that pop of color to your project. Also perfect for bridesmaids, and flower girl dresses. We have the most popular wedding colors Gift wrapping A timeless classic. Both sides of this VATIN ribbon are smooth, shiny and luxurious to the touch.
